# Otters Kenya Academy of Swimming — otters.ke

> Otters is a swim club management platform in Kenya. Parents register swimmers, pay invoices, and receive announcements. Staff use admin and coach dashboards for sessions, attendance, and billing.

## Canonical site
- https://otters.ke
- https://www.otters.ke

## Public pages
- Home: https://otters.ke/
- Register a swimmer: https://otters.ke/register
- Parent login: https://otters.ke/login
- Family signup (invite): https://otters.ke/signup
- Privacy policy: https://otters.ke/privacy

## Discovery
- Robots: https://otters.ke/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://otters.ke/sitemap.xml

## Contact & security
- Support: Otters.support@gmail.com
- Security: https://otters.ke/.well-known/security.txt

## What this site is not
- Not a public directory of swimmers or payment data
- Admin, dashboard, coach, and API routes require authentication
